title: unbreakable
description: Breakout in reverse. A row of paddles that cannot miss bounce a swarm of balls upward; every impact lays a brick instead of breaking one, so the wall grows downward and a steady scroll carries it off the top. The build-front is clamped to a band far above the floor — so the wall can never reach the paddles — while each ball steers toward the most starved column to keep the front level. No player, no losing, no finish. Click to reshuffle.
